title: Implement startup skills projection and primary decision output

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1034 and the startup proving slice of #1035 together: ordinary start output should center on next_safe_action, expose a compact skills projection, and keep detail behind selectors.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to startup output projection, skill catalog command/count projection, and tests for those surfaces.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Patch startup projection and tests, then validate the focused startup CLI suite.
completion_criteria: Default start output has next_safe_action as the only top-level primary action object.
Default start output includes a compact skills projection with required, recommended, and catalog summary/command.
Skill catalog drill-down commands use the resolved target rather than a stale ./repo placeholder.
Focused startup tests cover the projection and pass.
